title: Vodafone Idea Holdings Services is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Principal)

jsonLd.title: Vodafone Idea Holdings Services is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Principal)
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Vodafone Idea Holdings Services. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Full Stack Developer to strengthen our Pimpri-Chinchwad-based team.

About Vodafone Idea Holdings Services:
Vodafone Idea Holdings Services is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Integrate third-party APIs and services
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• CA / CMA / CFA certification
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in TypeScript
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in REST APIs
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in Docker

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Life and accident insurance
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Pimpri-Chinchwad, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Vodafone Idea Holdings Services!
